creator: candy@kgc.co.jp
text:
netpbm programs which link ppm/libppm4.c can't handle
	comment line (begins with `!') in /usr/X11R6/lib/X11/rgb.txt

Fix: cd /usr/ports/graphics/netpbm
make patch
cd work/netpbm
patch -p < this_patch
How-To-Repeat: 
	$ ppmtogif -transparent white
	ppmtogif: can't parse color names database line - "! $XConsortium: rgb.txt,v 10.41 94/02/20 18:39:36 rws Exp $
